message:
test(ssh): expand auth and host verification test coverage

auth.rs (+24 lines):
- Add test for try_answer() with an empty answer vector, verifying
  the reply channel delivers an empty vec to the receiver
- Add test for AuthenticationPrompt with empty prompt string and
  echo=false, exercising the minimal construction path

host.rs (+48 lines):
- Add HostVerificationFailed error source test (confirms source()
  returns None, per the Display-only error pattern)
- Add test for HostVerificationFailed with a file path, verifying
  the Display output includes remote_address, key fingerprint, and
  known_hosts file path
- Add HostVerificationEvent message accessibility test
- Add async reject test: send answer(false) through the channel
  and verify the receiver gets false

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
